[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010101 4
1 1110000 3
2 1000110 3
3 1000111 4
4 0101111 5
5 0111111 6
6 0110111 5
7 1111111 a

01 10 0000110 2
12 21 0000011 2
23 32 0000010 1
34 43 0010110 3
45 54 0110111 5 match 6
56 65 1010101 4 match 0
67 76 1010000 2
70 07 1000000 1

71 17 0000000 a

61 16 0000101 2
72 27 0100000 1
